data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Maintenance scheduling', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or tested. This indicates a clear gap in the coverage of the requirement as outlined in the exploratory step, as the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to maintenance scheduling.
gaps: No evidence of maintenance scheduling functionality being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the maintenance scheduling requirement.
